LanguageData.Luxandra_Setting_EnableLogging_Desc: Shows most actions in the log. Very spammy, only for debugging.
LanguageData.Luxandra_Setting_ShowNotifications_Desc: Shows the top-screen notification alerts when your colony successfully satisfies Luxandra's kinks.\n\n(can be spammy in large colonies)
LanguageData.Luxandra_Setting_ChildbirthAppraisal_Des:
Enables the judging of children birth.
Luxandra will compare the conception method with your colony beliefs (ideology > genes > traits) and either bless or curse you based on if they match.

(She will judge Bestiality, then Prostitution, and then Rape)
LanguageData.Luxandra_Setting_AnimalAppraisal_Label: Enable Childbirth Appraisal for colony animals
LanguageData.Luxandra_Setting_AnimalAppraisal_Desc: Births from colony animals will also be judged for your Bestiality affinity if birth humans.
LanguageData.Luxandra_Setting_AllowCumStains_Desc: Allows events that are meant to spawn large amount of cum filth to spawn the full amount.\n\nThis can be laggy on slower machines or large colonies, use with caution.
LanguageData.Luxandra_Setting_MonumentKinkShift_Desc: Allows Luxandra's Monument to change shape to match her current active kink.\n\nIf disabled, it stays in its No Kink form. (Reload the save to apply properly)
LanguageData.Luxandra_Setting_RemoveRomanceRestrictio: Remove Close Relatives Romance Restrictions (requires restart)
Removes the romance chance penalities related to incestuous relationships.
LanguageData.Luxandra_Setting_CycleInterval_Desc: Determines how frequently Luxandra will review your colony's satisfaction levels and deliver a special cyclic event.
LanguageData.Luxandra_Setting_RerollCondition_Desc: Determines what events Luxandra will reroll based on your sex acts.
LanguageData.Luxandra_Setting_ThresholdMultiplier_Des: Adjusts how strictly Luxandra demands satisfaction. Lower values make her easier to please; higher values require intense management.
With default settings a colony with normal sex activity should be able to consistently please her every 2 events on average.
LanguageData.Luxandra_Setting_Preview_NoGame: Live Preview: Load a save game file to see your active colony threshold preview.
